function.name: find_completion_candidates
function.signature: static void find_completion_candidates(const struct shell *sh, const struct shell_static_entry *cmd, const char *incompl_cmd, size_t *first_idx, size_t *cnt, uint16_t *longest)

bug.description: RTOS task stack size too small causing stack overflow into adjacent memory

prompt:
There is a RTOS task stack size too small causing stack overflow into adjacent memory downstream of function find_completion_candidates in the subsys/shell subsystem.
The function is located at subsys/shell/shell.c:328.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
